sections.html:
Required PPE:

☐ Hard Hat

☐ Safety Glasses

☐ High-Vis Vest

☐ Steel-Toe Boots

☐ Work Gloves

☐ Hearing Protection

☐ Respirator/Dust Mask

☐ Face Shield

Step #

Task Step Description

Potential Hazard

Hazard Control Measure

Responsible Party

1

Mobilize equipment and materials

Struck by moving equipment

Establish spotters, wear high-vis, clear communication

Foreman

2

Set up forms and rebar

Pinch points, cuts, back strain

Wear gloves, use proper lifting techniques, team lift

Crew

3

Pour concrete

Chemical burns, splashes

Wear long sleeves, rubber boots, safety glasses/face shield

Crew

4

Vibrate and finish concrete

Noise, vibration, silica dust

Hearing protection, anti-vibration gloves, wet methods

Finisher

5

Clean up tools and area

Slips/trips on debris

Maintain housekeeping, store tools properly

Crew

6

7

8

9

10
